name: Ice Maker Assembly
description: OEM GE ice maker assembly. Fits side-by-side and French door refrigerators. Includes ice maker module, tray, and mounting hardware.

name: Refrigerator Water Filter
description: OEM Whirlpool refrigerator water filter. Replaces filter 4, EveryDrop EDR4RXD1. Fits many Whirlpool, Maytag, KitchenAid, and JennAir refrigerators.

name: Refrigerator Door Shelf Bar
description: OEM Frigidaire refrigerator door shelf bar, clear. Replaces broken or cracked door shelf retainers on many Frigidaire and Electrolux models.

name: Refrigerator Temperature Control Thermostat
description: OEM GE refrigerator temperature control thermostat. Symptoms of a bad thermostat include refrigerator not cooling or freezing food.

name: Dishwasher Spray Arm
description: OEM Whirlpool dishwasher lower spray arm. If your dishwasher is not cleaning dishes properly, a cracked or clogged spray arm may be the cause.

name: Dishwasher Door Latch Assembly
description: OEM Whirlpool dishwasher door latch assembly. Replaces door strike, handle, and micro switch. Fits many Whirlpool, Maytag, and KitchenAid dishwashers.

name: Dishwasher Detergent and Rinse Aid Dispenser
description: OEM Frigidaire dishwasher soap dispenser assembly. If detergent dispenser door does not open during the wash cycle, this part may need replacement.
